recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_low__criticality_high maps to default recommendation 'pr_only'. Risk is low and business criticality is high. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.70, privilege_level=1.00, internet_exposure=0.00, matched_signals=none. Relationship context is incomplete, so the recommendation remains conservative and advisory unless policy overrides it. Current execution surfaces stay PR-only, so this recommendation remains advisory until the reviewed bundle is applied.

strategies.decision_rationale: Compatibility resolver defaulted to the compatible profile 'ebs_enable_default_encryption_aws_managed_kms_pr_bundle' for strategy 'ebs_enable_default_encryption_aws_managed_kms_pr_bundle'.

dependency_checks.message: Default encryption applies to newly created volumes; existing volumes are unchanged.

strategies.impact_text: All new EBS volumes in this region will be encrypted by default.
strategies.label: Generate PR bundle for default EBS encryption (AWS managed key)
warnings: Apply the bundle before creating new volumes to enforce encryption by default.

strategies.decision_rationale: Compatibility resolver defaulted to the compatible profile 'ebs_enable_default_encryption_customer_kms_pr_bundle' for strategy 'ebs_enable_default_encryption_customer_kms_pr_bundle'.

dependency_checks.message: Validate KMS key policy/grants for all required service and compute principals.

strategies.impact_text: All new EBS volumes in this region will be encrypted by default using the specified customer-managed KMS key.

fields.description: Customer-managed KMS key ARN to set as EBS default key.

strategies.label: Generate PR bundle for default EBS encryption (customer KMS key)
warnings: Validate key policy access and regional key alignment before apply.
